Class NfcUnitService

java.lang.Object
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.nfc.NfcUnitService
@Service @Transactional public class NfcUnitService extends Object
Manages NFC tags mounted on resources and dispatches scans.

A tag is registered on a resource by whoever may update that resource. Scanning, by contrast, is a physical event available to any authenticated user; what it does depends on the tag's type. A NfcUnit.NfcUnitType.TIMETRACKER tag toggles the time tracking of its bound Task — the actual authorization for that (project membership) and the tracking state live in TaskService/Task.

Author:
peter haller

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    NfcUnitService.NfcUnitData
    Editable tag fields, decoupling the service from HTTP DTOs.
    static final record 
    NfcUnitService.ScanResult
    Outcome of a scan, describing what the tag triggered.

  • Constructor Details

    • NfcUnitService

      public NfcUnitService()

  • Method Details

    • registerNfcUnit

      public NfcUnit registerNfcUnit(Long resourceId, NfcUnitService.NfcUnitData data, PUser user)
      Registers a new NFC tag on a resource. Requires Action.UPDATE on the resource.
      Parameters:
      resourceId - the resource the tag is mounted on
      data - the tag's fields (uuid and type are mandatory)
      user - the requesting user
      Returns:
      the persisted tag
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if uuid/type is missing or the uuid is already in use

    • getNfcUnitsForResource

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<NfcUnit> getNfcUnitsForResource(Long resourceId, PUser user)

    • bindTask

      public NfcUnit bindTask(Long nfcUnitId, Long taskId, PUser user)
      Binds a NfcUnit.NfcUnitType.TIMETRACKER tag to the task whose tracking it should toggle (Variant 2: one tracker tag ↔ exactly one task). Requires Action.UPDATE on the tag's resource.
      Parameters:
      nfcUnitId - the tag id
      taskId - the task to bind
      user - the requesting user
      Returns:
      the updated tag
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the tag is not a TIMETRACKER

    • unbindTask

      public NfcUnit unbindTask(Long nfcUnitId, PUser user)
      Clears the task binding of a TIMETRACKER tag. Requires UPDATE on the tag's resource.

    • deleteNfcUnit

      public void deleteNfcUnit(Long nfcUnitId, PUser user)
      Deletes an NFC tag. Requires UPDATE on the tag's resource.

    • scan

      public NfcUnitService.ScanResult scan(String uuid, PUser user)
      Processes a scan of the tag with the given uuid. Records the scan time and dispatches by type: a TIMETRACKER toggles its bound task's tracking, a COUNTER bumps its sequence number, other types are merely recorded. Available to any authenticated user; the TIMETRACKER path additionally enforces the task's project membership via TaskService.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the scanned tag's uuid
      user - the scanning user
      Returns:
      what the scan triggered
      Throws:
      NoSuchElementException - if no tag with that uuid exists
      IllegalStateException - if a TIMETRACKER tag has no task bound
